name: T3-WF-4 parallel review
description: A sequential intake slot, a 2-lane parallel review block, then a sequential summarize slot whose emit references BOTH lanes' outputs (referenceable only after the join). Version-pinned tier-3 fixture (specs/developing/testing/scenarios.md#T3-WF-4) — the Sentry-triage mock shape. Parallel forces worktree isolation + cloud target (has_parallel_groups gate rejects local + session bindings).

steps.label: Plan the review
steps.name: plan
steps.prompt: Read the change {{inputs.change}} and produce a short plan naming two review angles.

steps.label: Review angle A
steps.name: review_a_out
steps.prompt: Review the change {{inputs.change}} along angle {{plan.angle_a}}. Give a verdict.

steps.label: Review angle B
steps.name: review_b_out
steps.prompt: Review the change {{inputs.change}} along angle {{plan.angle_b}}. Give a verdict.

steps.label: Merge both lane verdicts
steps.name: summary
steps.prompt: Combine the two reviews: A said {{review_a_out.verdict}}, B said {{review_b_out.verdict}}. Produce a single merged verdict.
